action: Implement rollback-resistant witness-key policy rotation with constrained emergency revocation.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed locally; committed test source was re-fetched from GitHub.

handoff: R-013 should add a monotonic client state store and recovery packet so accepted policy sequence and digest survive restart and stale mirrors cannot replay an older otherwise-valid policy.
limits: No production key service or witness network was exercised.
Threshold signatures do not prove operator independence or uncompromised custody.
Emergency authority distribution remains an operational trust decision.
